title: Noem Defends Describing Minneapolis Protesters’ Actions as Domestic Terrorism
author: Michael Gold and Madeleine Ngo
fullText: Kristi Noem, the homeland security secretary, told senators she got her information from agents on the ground. But heads of two immigration agencies said last month it did not come from them.
summary: Kristi Noem, the homeland security secretary, told senators she got her information from agents on the ground. But heads of two immigration agencies said last month it did not come from them.
